title: Create Nether Vinery
description: Create Nether Vinery is a useful compatibility layer between [Let's Do] NetherVinery and Create.
body:
Create Nether Vinery is a useful compatibility layer between [Let's Do] NetherVinery and Create. It adds recipes for grape processing
- Compaction recipes for turning crimson and warped grapes into their respective grape juices
- Filling recipes for filling wine bottles with grape juices
